title: MiracleCraft
description: It is new miraculous mod, invented by GahnoS2712, developed by Ephemeral, and designed by Celeus and Bozuk
body:
MiracleCraft is miraculous minecraft mod  

Welcome to MiracleCraft! It is a new mod, Invented by GahnoS2712, and developed by Ephemeral. Mostly same staff team, New Discord Server and New Version! Welcome!

- Ladybug miraculous - Tikki, kwami of creation
- Black Cat miraculous - Plagg, kwami of destruction
- Butterfly/Moth miraculous - Nooroo, kwami of transmission
- Bee miraculous - Pollen, kwami of action
- Turtle miraculous - Wayzz, kwami of protection
- Rabbit miraculous - Fluff, kwami of evolution
- Rooster miraculous - Orikko, kwami of pretension
And other  

~Others coming soon~ 

What Miraculer adds:  
-Mostly All miraculous from original miracle box.  
Also there you can see some elements from bugaboocraft, miraculer. Because we own them.

Some photos will be later

For this mod you need to use:
- Pehkui  
- CuriosAPI  
- Geckolib  
- Zyshock`s lib.  
   
All this mods you can get here  
🔽🔽🔽🔽🔽🔽🔽🔽🔽🔽🔽

https://discord.gg/ZJUVv6wgKQ
